name: Burning Blood
source_notes: Deckseer Relic Choice V1 seed: sustain relic; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact trigger simulation.

name: Akabeko
source_notes: Deckseer Relic Choice V1 seed: immediate damage/frontload relic; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact trigger simulation.

name: Blood Vial
source_notes: Local STS2 pck localization: BLOOD_VIAL title is Blood Vial; description says it heals HP at the start of each combat.
Installed v0.4.6 card reward proof revealed BLOOD_VIAL as an unmapped owned relic; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact heal timing simulation.

name: Centennial Puzzle
source_notes: Local STS2 pck localization: CENTENNIAL_PUZZLE title is Centennial Puzzle; description says the first HP loss each combat draws cards.
Installed v0.4.7 card reward proof revealed CENTENNIAL_PUZZLE as an unmapped owned relic; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact trigger simulation.

name: Kunai
source_notes: Deckseer Relic Choice V1 seed: attack-density payoff that can improve block over longer fights; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact trigger simulation.

name: Mr. Struggles
source_notes: Local STS2 pck localization: MR_STRUGGLES title is Mr. Struggles; description says at the start of your turn it deals damage equal to the turn number to all enemies.
Installed v0.4.7 card reward proof revealed MR_STRUGGLES as an unmapped owned relic; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact trigger simulation.

name: Orichalcum
source_notes: Local STS2 pck localization: ORICHALCUM title is Orichalcum; description says if you end your turn without Block, gain Block.
Installed v0.4.7 card reward proof revealed ORICHALCUM as an unmapped owned relic; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact trigger simulation.

name: Pael's Eye
source_notes: Local STS2 pck localization: PAELS_EYE title is Pael's Eye; description says the first time each combat you end your turn without playing cards, exhaust your hand and take an extra turn.
Installed v0.4.7 card reward proof revealed PAELS_EYE as an unmapped owned relic; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact extra-turn simulation.

name: Shuriken
source_notes: Local STS2 pck localization: SHURIKEN title is Shuriken; description says playing a threshold number of Attacks in one turn grants Strength.
Installed v0.4.7 card reward proof revealed SHURIKEN as an unmapped owned relic; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact trigger count simulation.

name: Strike Dummy
source_notes: Local STS2 pck localization: STRIKE_DUMMY title is Strike Dummy; description says cards containing Strike deal additional damage.
Installed v0.4.7 card reward proof revealed STRIKE_DUMMY as an unmapped owned relic; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact damage simulation.

name: Tea of Discourtesy
source_notes: Local STS2 pck localization: TEA_OF_DISCOURTESY title is Tea of Discourtesy; description says at the start of the next combat it shuffles Dazed into the draw pile.

Installed v0.4.7 card reward proof revealed TEA_OF_DISCOURTESY as an unmapped owned relic during the Tea Master/event route handoff; mapped as sparse metadata only, not route approval or exact Dazed-count simulation.

name: Letter Opener
source_notes: Installed STS2 v0.106.1 pck localization: LETTER_OPENER title/description; playing a threshold number of Skills in one turn deals damage to all enemies.
Reviewed after installed v0.4.3 treasure relic diagnostic revealed LETTER_OPENER; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact trigger count or damage simulation.

name: Lost Coffer
source_notes: Local STS2 pck localization: LOST_COFFER title is Lost Coffer; description says upon pickup it gives one card reward and procures one random potion.
Installed v0.4.7 local-MVP alert revealed LOST_COFFER as an unmapped owned relic; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact card-reward or potion EV simulation.

name: Lead Paperweight
source_notes: Installed STS2 v0.106.1 pck localization: LEAD_PAPERWEIGHT title/description; pickup adds one of two Colorless cards to the deck.
Reviewed after v0.2.16 relic ID diagnostic revealed LEAD_PAPERWEIGHT; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact card-pool EV.

name: Ring of the Snake
source_notes: Installed STS2 v0.106.1 pck localization: RING_OF_THE_SNAKE title/description; starts each combat with additional draw.
Reviewed after v0.2.16 relic ID diagnostic revealed RING_OF_THE_SNAKE; simplified metadata for planning only, not exact draw count simulation.
